title: Consciousness and Sleep as Δϕ Maintenance Modes
one_sentence: This module defines consciousness and sleep as functional maintenance modes regulating Δϕ persistence.

core_compression.consciousness: Consciousness := Regulate(Δϕ) such that Δϕ does not collapse to 0
core_compression.sleep: Sleep := Maintenance(Δϕ) by reorganizing traces and reducing drift

failure_modes.F19_1: no sleep / over-persistence -> coherence cost explodes and closure risk increases
failure_modes.F19_2: excess sleep / under-persistence -> Δϕ becomes too weak and meaning/value formation fails
failure_modes.F19_3: corrupted sleep -> maintenance fails and drift increases upon waking
